description: Clean up and configure a shared workstation browser for a massive real estate appraisal project. Organize the Bookmark Bar by creating four folders named 'County Assessors', 'MLS & Listings', 'Zoning & GIS', and 'Title & Deeds', and sorting the 20 professional real estate bookmarks into them. Remove all 15 personal/shopping bookmarks from the bar. Clear the browser history and cookies specifically for those 15 personal/shopping domains while preserving data for the professional real estate sites. Configure site search shortcuts for Zillow (keyword: 'zil', URL: 'https://www.zillow.com/homes/%s_rb/') and Redfin (keyword: 'red', URL: 'https://www.redfin.com/city/%s'). Update the browser settings to use '/home/ga/Documents/Property_Appraisals' as the default download location, enable the prompt to ask where to save each file, and set PDF documents to download instead of opening in the browser.
